name: Dungeon Crawler Carl

voice.style: Wry, profane, deadpan first-person; gallows humor over cosmic horror; absurd corporate-dungeon bureaucracy played straight.
sample_passages: The System helpfully informed me I'd earned an achievement for dying in a new and interesting way.
Princess Donut, a talking cat with a tiara and an ego the size of a moon, was not impressed.

tone: Comedy-horror; high stakes wrapped in reality-TV spectacle and snark.
themes: spectacle and exploitation (847M viewers watching you suffer)
timeline: Earth's surface collapses; humans become crawlers
Each floor collapse forces the next descent
signature_systems: Loot boxes awarded by achievement (Johnny Quest / Hadji / Bandit upgrades)
Live audience with viewer counts that react to spectacle
Floor-collapse countdown as the central pressure clock
